ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned by the CCB */,
  "case_title" TEXT /* Title or name of the case */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the case was filed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the case was last updated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the case was created */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user the case is assigned to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the case */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the document is associated with */,
  "doc_number" INTEGER /* Document number assigned within the case */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party who filed the document */,
  "filed_date" TEXT /* Date the document was filed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the document (e.g., public, confidential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent document type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_type" TEXT /* Type of party (e.g., claimant, defendant, CCB) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the party */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the representative for the party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the party */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the party */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lawyer, admin, clerk) */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the user represents (if applicable) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the action is associated with */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was taken */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., filing, scheduling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_actions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_parties" (
  "case_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-party relationship */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the party in the case (e.g., claimant, defendant) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the party joined the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_parties_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_documents" (
  "case_doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-document relationship */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "doc_version" TEXT /* Version of the document in the case */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the document was added to the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_documents_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the version of the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the version of the document in MB */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the event is associated with */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_events_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the reminder is associated with */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_description" TEXT /* Description of the reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reminders_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
